bullets: Managed the engineering team in a Scrum environment, owning sprint planning, backlog prioritization, and delivery accountability for a cloud-based SaaS platform.
Led architecture and code review across a Vue.js front-end, PHP/Laravel back-end, and AWS infrastructure, maintaining quality standards while shipping predictably.
Reduced AWS costs by over $6,000/month through infrastructure analysis and right-sizing across EC2, RDS, and related services.
Migrated development and production environments to Docker, improving deployment consistency and reducing onboarding friction for new engineers.
Drove product direction cross-functionally with design, operations, and clients. Created Figma prototypes and gathered feature feedback directly from end users.
Coordinated vendor relationships and managed external consulting engagements through platform end-of-life after acquisition by Shepherd Veterinary Software.
Shipped 11+ web applications end-to-end, spanning Vue.js front-ends, Node.js and PHP back-end APIs, database design, and CI/CD pipelines.
Replaced legacy institutional systems with modern web applications, automating manual administrative workflows and improving operational efficiency across departments.
Built system integrations including cron-based data synchronization from network-restricted Oracle databases with complex multi-table joins.
Ran cross-functional requirement-gathering meetings across HR, academic departments, and faculty, translating business needs into technical solutions.
Mentored developers and collaborated across teams, bridging design, development, and stakeholder perspectives to deliver reliable, maintainable software.

projects.name: Hippo Manager 2.0
projects.tech: Vue.js, Laravel, GraphQL, MySQL, Amazon Web Services (AWS), Docker, Tailwind CSS
projects.description: Cloud-based SaaS platform for veterinary clinics covering billing, scheduling, client management, reporting, and treatments. Built with Vue.js, Laravel/GraphQL API, and AWS infrastructure.

projects.name: Course Schedule
projects.tech: Vue.js, .NET, PostgreSQL, Oracle Database, Firebase, Docker, Tailwind CSS
projects.description: Data-driven application syncing course data hourly from a legacy Oracle schema involving seven-table joins, with a Vue.js filtering interface and PostgreSQL application layer.
